flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Purdue University Fort Wayne vs the 2018–2022 baseline (32.5% vs 38.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Purdue University Fort Wayne fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Purdue University Fort Wayne rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (57.4% → 66.6%).
